name: New Mexico Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Green chile, chopped (remove the seeds and devein)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Pour the batter into a greased cast iron skillet.
3. Bake at 400 degrees F in oven for 45 minutes.
4. Cool slightly, slice like a pie, and serve.
For those who don't want or have the time to prepare from scratch, use 2 packages of cornbread mix (the kind in a tear-open envelope, not the box) prepared as on the package. Stir in the cream corn, green chile, and cheese just before pouring into the skillet. Use the same oven temperature and cooking time as described above. The added ingredients will require increasing the cooking time indicated on the package.
